summary: Iteration 257: Complete Premium Dashboard Redesign Testing. All 29/29 dashboard features verified working. New dashboard includes hero cards, universal AI prompt with intent detection, inspiration templates, tool categories with tabs, credits panel with usage bar, activity feed, popular tools section, and quick links. All navigation, buttons, and integrations working correctly.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays bottom UI when first visiting - functional but minor visual issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 257 verified complete premium dashboard redesign. All dashboard features working: hero cards (Story Video, Photo to Comic, Reel Generator), universal AI prompt with keyword detection (video->story-video-studio, reel->reels), 6 inspiration templates, Recent Creations section with View All to /app/history, Creator Tools with 4 category tabs (Video/Image/Story/Social Tools), Credits panel with infinity symbol for 999,999+ credits, Buy Credits & Plans buttons, Activity feed, 6 Popular tool pills, Quick links section, OWASP badge in footer. Admin panel button visible for admin users only.
